summary: Regression retest of the sonner toast bug fix on Best Sellers 'Add' buttons plus Phase 2 render checks. All four assertions passed: Hill Filter Coffee toast title/desc correct, Wild Hill Honey null-price toast desc correct, 15 category cards and 6 best-seller cards render from backend.
passed: Homepage loads without errors on public URL
Best Sellers renders 6 product cards (backend integration OK)
Add-to-cart on 'Hill Filter Coffee' shows toast title 'Hill Filter Coffee added' and description exactly '₹60 · Small' (bug fixed, no '[object Object]')
Add-to-cart on 'Wild Hill Honey' (null price) shows toast description exactly 'Final price will be confirmed before pickup.' with no rupee symbol
